entities.name: SOUTH ASIA
entities.description: A region in Asia experiencing food production gains but facing resource degradation and low productivity.

entities.name: WEST ASIA
entities.description: A region in Asia where agriculture is the dominant economic activity.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A South Asian country participating in the research need assessment.

entities.name: SRI LANKA
entities.description: A South Asian country participating in the research need assessment.

entities.name: BANGLADESH
entities.description: A South Asian country participating in the research need assessment.

entities.name: NEPAL
entities.description: A South Asian country participating in the research need assessment.

entities.name: IRAN
entities.description: A West Asian country participating in the research need assessment.

entities.name: FOOD PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of producing food, which has seen impressive gains in South Asia.

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food.

entities.name: RURAL POVERTY
entities.description: A state of economic hardship in rural areas, which has been reduced in South Asia.

entities.name: DEGRADATION OF NATURAL RESOURCES
entities.description: The deterioration of the environment through depletion of resources, persisting in South Asia.

entities.name: WATER SCARCITY
entities.description: The lack of sufficient available water resources to meet demands, persisting in South Asia.

entities.name: LOW PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The state of producing low yields or outputs in agriculture, persisting in South Asia.

entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The science or practice of farming, the dominant economic activity in South and West Asia.

entities.name: DEMAND-DRIVEN RESEARCH AGENDA
entities.description: A research plan based on the actual needs and demands of stakeholders.

entities.name: PARTICIPATORY APPROACH
entities.description: A method involving stakeholders in the decision-making and research process to establish a research agenda.

entities.name: GAP ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to identify the difference between current state and desired goals to determine research priorities.

entities.name: GENETIC IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: A broad research theme focused on enhancing the genetic makeup of crops.

entities.name: NATURAL RESOURCES MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A broad research theme focused on the sustainable use of natural resources.

entities.name: SOCIOECONOMIC AND POLICY RESEARCH
entities.description: A broad research theme focused on the social, economic, and policy aspects of agriculture.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, an organization involved in establishing the research agenda.

entities.name: ICAR
entities.description: Indian Council of Agricultural Research, an organization involved in establishing the research agenda.

entities.name: APAARI
entities.description: Asia-Pacific Association for Agricultural Research Institutions, an organization involved in establishing the research agenda.
